notes:
Both issues fixed successfully:

USR-001: Removed width='21' and height='16' attributes from tertiary-arrow.svg, keeping only viewBox. This allows the SVG to scale properly within its container (w-5 h-4) instead of rendering at intrinsic size.

USR-002: Changed video container from fixed heights (h-[294px] sm:h-[600px]) to aspect-video for proper 16:9 aspect ratio. Changed video element from object-contain back to object-cover to properly fill the container without letterboxing. Applied changes in both PHP and TSX files to maintain sync.

Build completed successfully with only pre-existing warnings (experimental API usage and hook dependencies). No TypeScript errors introduced.
